2604.05965.title: Beyond Compromise: Pareto-Lenient Consensus for Efficient Multi-Preference LLM Alignment
2604.05965.paper_summary: Transcending the single-preference paradigm, aligning LLMs with diverse human values is pivotal for robust deployment. Contemporary Multi-Objective Preference Alignment (MPA) approaches predominantly rely on static linear scalarization or rigid gradient projection to navigate these trade-offs. However, by enforcing strict conflict avoidance or simultaneous descent, these paradigms often prematurely converge to local stationary points. While mathematically stable, these points represent a conservative compromise where the model sacrifices potential global Pareto improvements to avoid transient local trade-offs. To break this deadlock, we propose Pareto-Lenient Consensus (PLC), a game-theoretic framework that reimagines alignment as a dynamic negotiation process. Unlike rigid approaches, PLC introduces consensus-driven lenient gradient rectification, which dynamically tolerates local degradation provided there is a sufficient dominant coalition surplus, thereby empowering the optimization trajectory to escape local suboptimal equilibrium and explore the distal Pareto-optimal frontier. Theoretical analysis validates PLC can facilitate stalemate escape and asymptotically converge to a Pareto consensus equilibrium. Moreover, extensive experiments show that PLC surpasses baselines in both fixed-preference alignment and global Pareto frontier quality. This work highlights the potential of negotiation-driven alignment as a promising avenue for MPA. Our codes are available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/aaa-6BB8.
2604.05965.paper_summary_zh: 超越單一偏好範式，將大型語言模型（LLMs）與多樣的人類價值觀對齊對於穩健的部署至關重要。當代的多目標偏好對齊（MPA）方法主要依賴靜態線性標量化或僵化的梯度投影來處理這些權衡。然而，通過強制嚴格的衝突避免或同時下降，這些範式往往過早地收斂到局部穩定點。儘管在數學上穩定，這些點代表了一種保守的妥協，模型為了避免瞬時的局部權衡而犧牲了潛在的全球帕累托改進。為了解決這一僵局，我們提出了帕累托寬容共識（PLC），這是一個博弈論框架，將對齊重新構想為一個動態談判過程。與僵化的方法不同，PLC引入了以共識為驅動的寬容梯度修正，這在存在足夠的主導聯盟盈餘的情況下，動態容忍局部退化，從而使優化軌跡能夠逃離局部次優平衡並探索遠端的帕累托最優邊界。理論分析驗證了PLC可以促進僵局的逃脫，並漸近收斂到帕累托共識平衡。此外，大量實驗顯示，PLC在固定偏好對齊和全球帕累托邊界質量方面均超越基準。這項工作突顯了以談判為驅動的對齊作為多目標偏好對齊（MPA）的一個有前景的途徑的潛力。我們的代碼可在 https://anonymous.4open.science/r/aaa-6BB8 獲得。
2604.05965.author: Renxuan Tan et.al.
2604.05965.authors: Renxuan Tan, Rongpeng Li, Zhifeng Zhao, Honggang Zhang
